name: @autoviral/cli
description: Agent-facing CLI that bridges any shell agent to the AutoViral Studio.
comment: yaml stays an EXTERNAL runtime dep (NOT bundled): yaml's CJS does require('process'), which tsup's ESM output cannot satisfy ('Dynamic require of process is not supported'). It is hoisted into the ROOT autoviral package's dependencies so the published/packaged bin resolves it at runtime; the desktop build asarUnpacks node_modules/yaml. undici was dropped entirely — HTTP now uses Node 20+ global fetch.
